text: Dalihan Natolu is a philosophy of life from an old traditional point of view of Batak Toba people which has become a tradition of Batak Toba life from a long time ago until now. It is the guide and the rules of life that is applicable in the Batak Toba community which is explained in three terms of the natolu custom of the dalihan, namely: sombah marhula-hula (respecting bones / uncles), mordongan tubu (surnames), elek marboru (coaxing girls). To know the philosophy of the dalihan natolu custom in the life of Batak Toba people, the existence of the natolu dalihan custom in the life of Batak Toba people and also to know the change that occurs in the natolu dalihan custom in the life of Batak Toba people. This research is a qualitative research. Qualitative research is used to see the application of traditional philosophy of dalihan natolu in the life of Batak Toba people in district of Kecamatan Pinggir. The result of the research is that the traditional philosophy of dalihan natolu is a custom that is applied in the social life of Batak Toba community which unifies the life of the community into a whole, balanced, harmonious and unity as a whole and through the three elements of the natolu dalihan custom, namely: sombah marhula-hula (respecting bones / uncles), manat mardongan tubu (being careful in developing friendship/surnames), and elek marboru (persuading the girl). For the continuity of the three elements of the natolu dalihan custom is that in their relationship towards other people in the community, they should always have a good attitude and respect each other’s position, accordingly the natolu dalihan custom always exists in the life of Batak Toba people and it has a direct connection with the life of Batak Toba people, even in the smallest thing in their life like (mangupa, birth, naming the child, and the main thing is in event that have the rules and norms). The change of time is the main factor in the life of people, thus, if there is no understanding or application of the three elements of the natolu dalihan custom of Batak Toba in their life, then it will cause a marriage relationship and therefore an alteration occurs in the custom of the dalihan natolu in the life of Batak Toba people. Because there is no longer an attitude or respect towards the three elements of the natolu dalihan custom of Batak Toba.
explanation: The text contains plausible domain-specific Batak Toba content but exhibits translation-like phrasing and repetitive structures typical of AI-generated or machine-translated drafts. This uncertainty justifies a moderate probability rather than a high certainty.
